# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 57.861 Hz Gain -9.000 dB Q 2.9934
  biquad b0=0.999315575682 b1=-1.99786404164 b2=0.998562792198 a1=-1.99786404164 a2=0.99787836788
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 170.654 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00029055984 b1=-1.99846668916 b2=0.998300793371 a1=-1.99846668916 a2=0.998591353214
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 106.934 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.5535
  biquad b0=1.00034153612 b1=-1.9982952757 b2=0.998002681854 a1=-1.9982952757 a2=0.998344217979

  biquad b0=0.999631336979 b1=-1.99801213162 b2=0.998384844191 a1=-1.99801213162 a2=0.99801618117

  biquad b0=0.999816608302 b1=-1.99886644975 b2=0.999077884357 a1=-1.99886644975 a2=0.998894492658
